creator: takeshi.mutoh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222732
Recover version of sysutils/docker-freebsd

The sysutils/docker-freebsd is already expired and deleted.
This PR recover last SVN version of sysutils/docker-freebsd.

How to recover by hand: https://scrapbox.io/BSD/Docker_on_FreeBSD_with_1.7.0-dev

Of course I know that some people update new version of sysutils/docker-freebsd. 
For example: 
- Update sysutils/docker-freebsd to somewhere circa v17.05.0 https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12270
- Update sysutils/docker-freebsd to new version https://reviews.freebsd.org/D21570

How about updating sysutils/docker-freebsd to something like this?
1. [This patch] Recover old sysutils/docker-freebsd.
2. [D12270] Update to v17.05.0.
3. [D21570] Update to mobi version.
